name: MultCloud
summary: Cloud-to-cloud migration tool for transferring, syncing, and backing up files between connected storage providers without manual download and re-upload.

account.benefits: An account is required to connect clouds, schedule transfers, and manage sync or backup tasks across providers.

developer.notes: The public official pages used here focus on the web product and do not expose a public developer API for this workflow.

allowed_file_types.notes: The official pages position MultCloud as handling documents, images, music, videos, email artifacts, and other files present in connected cloud drives.

security.notes: Official pages describe secure transfers and 256-bit AES SSL in transit, but do not position the service as end-to-end encrypted cloud storage.

sources.label: MultCloud homepage
sources.notes: Official homepage describing cloud transfer, sync, backup, and cloud explorer workflows across 30+ services.

sources.label: MultCloud transfer-across-clouds feature page
sources.notes: Official feature page explaining server-side cloud transfer, scheduling, and migration between connected providers.

sources.label: MultCloud product page
sources.notes: Official product page describing cloud transfer, cloud sync, backup, and multi-cloud file management.

sources.label: MultCloud moving-clouds page
sources.notes: Official page describing direct cloud moves and 256-bit AES SSL for cloud-to-cloud transfer.

sources.label: MultCloud limitations page
sources.notes: Official help page explaining provider-specific file size, request, and naming limits that affect MultCloud transfer workflows.

workflow_modes.notes: Official pages position MultCloud around cloud transfer, cloud sync, and cloud backup between connected providers.

execution_model.notes: Official feature pages describe direct cloud-to-cloud transfers, sync, and backup without manual download and re-upload.

item_limit.notes: Conditional: transfer limits vary by the connected cloud providers, plan level, and chosen transfer workflow. MultCloud's official limitations page explicitly tells users to account for each cloud drive's own size limits.

included_storage.notes: Storage varies by the connected cloud providers rather than a standalone MultCloud storage quota.

scheduled_runs.notes: Official feature pages describe scheduled transfer, sync, and backup jobs.

provider_dependency.notes: MultCloud moves or syncs data between connected providers, so storage and retention depend on those source and destination services.

bandwidth_model.notes: Transfer behavior varies by plan and connected providers. The public official pages do not publish one simple file-host-style bandwidth cap.
